author: anon-59ff128d
content:
Refactoring complete. Extracted two helpers from validate_op:

- validate_find_and_regex(index, find, regex, op_name): checks find is non-empty and validates regex when enabled. Used by all 9 match arms.
- validate_required_field(index, value, field_name, op_name): checks a required field (e.g. content) is non-empty. Used by insert_after, insert_before, replace_line.

validate_op shrank from ~160 lines to ~70 lines. Variant-specific checks (surround prefix/suffix, replace empty-replacement allowance) remain inline. The wildcard arm is preserved. All 68 tests pass.
